stemHtml: The presence of icing conditions, in-flight, on an aircraft using an advisory ice detection system…

options.a: provides the flight crew with an ice warning annunciation and automatically activates the aircraft`s de-icing system.
options.b: requires the flight crew to monitor for icing, according to the AFM.
options.c: requires the flight crew to immediately activate the aircraft`s primary ice protection system.
options.d: provides the flight crew with an ice warning annunciation and automatically activates the aircraft`s anti-icing system.
